agent: edit
description: Execute all tasks until completion, with no confirmation required
---
NOTE: read the instructions from `windows-antigravity-fix.md` first if the current agent is being run through Antigravity on a Windows machine.
Perform all unchecked tasks listed in `task.md`, keeping the rules from `.github/rules.md` in mind. At the completion of each task, whether it has been fully tesed or not, check off the item in `task.md` so we understand that the work is complete. Repeat this until all tasks are completed, and suggest how each of the implemented feature can be manually tested.
